qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_categ_examen as oi_categ_examen, t0.c_categ_examen as c_categ_examen, t0.d_categ_examen as d_categ_examen, SEC.policy, t0.c_categ_examen as CODE, t0.d_categ_examen as TEXT FROM MED11_CATEG_EXAMEN as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.MedicinaLaboral.CategoriasExamen.CATEG_EXAMEN\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_categ_examen LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_categ_examen asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_categ_examen as oi_categ_examen, SEC.policy FROM MED11_CATEG_EXAMEN as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.MedicinaLaboral.CategoriasExamen.CATEG_EXAMEN\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_categ_examen LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_categ_examen asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.MedicinaLaboral.CategoriasExamen.CATEG_EXAMEN.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.MedicinaLaboral.CategoriasExamen.CATEG_EXAMEN.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(MED11_CATEG_EXAMEN.oi_categ_examen) as CNT from MED11_CATEG_EXAMEN Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and MED11_CATEG_EXAMEN.oi_categ_examen={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(MED11_CATEG_EXAMEN.d_categ_examen,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(MED11_CATEG_EXAMEN.c_categ_examen,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and [PARENT]={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW
